chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. D – 37 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on withdrawal statement dated 20.10.2023 3. For hearing of main case 19.12.2023 None present. No intimation is received. However, Counsel for applicants has already filed a statement dated 20.10.2023 not pressing this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
